name: Thorns of the Briar Queen
inspire: At the start of your turn, Inspire each friendly fighter that is adjacent to any enemy fighters.

reactions.name: Paired Thugs
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after a friendly fighter Moves.
reactions.flavorText: Criminals and cut-throats in life, criminals and cut-throats evermore...
reactions.rulesText: Pick an enemy fighter adjacent to that fighter to be mugged. You can only use this ability once per game.

reactions.name: No Room at the Top
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after an enemy leader ({icon:leader}) uses a Core ability.
reactions.flavorText: To earn the jealous ire of the Briar Queen is to be marked for a grim fate.
reactions.rulesText: Pick that fighter to be mugged. You can only use this ability once per game.

reactions.name: Reprisals
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after an enemy fighter's successful Attack.
reactions.flavorText: 'Raise thy blade against us and be accursed...'
reactions.rulesText: Pick that fighter to be mugged. You can only use this ability once per game.

reactions.name: Leave Well Alone
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after an enemy fighter Moves if they are holding a treasure token.
reactions.flavorText: Darest thou clasp a relic of yore when the spirits of the dead are abroad?
reactions.rulesText: Pick that fighter to be mugged. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Wave of Terror
abilities.rulesText: If the target of a friendly fighter's Attack is adjacent to another friendly fighter that has any Charge tokens, the target is Surrounded for that Attack.

abilities.name: Soul Warden
abilities.rulesText: Pick a friendly Varclav to use this ability. Pick up to 2 friendly minions ({icon:minion}). Push each of those fighters up to 2 hexes. Then, you can give each of those fighters a Charge token. This ability can only be used once per battle round.

abilities.name: Mugged
abilities.rulesText: Immediately after an enemy fighter is picked to be mugged (see right), pick a friendly fighter that is not your leader ({icon:leader}). Remove that fighter from the battlefield and place them in an empty hex adjacent to that enemy fighter. Then, you can give that friendly fighter a Charge token.
